reviews.review_description: It doesn't work before, until v2.5. They fix the problem so i can finally open the world. The world is good but the quality is not that high. But anyway, it works. So i give 4 stars for that.
I was easily able to scan my apartment. The final output was very detailed and complete.

Of course, as soon as the app loaded, I did what 99.9% of anyone who tried this even once did ... a scan of my house interior. The interface is simplistic, yet engaging. There are several hints that drop as you build your space, the most critical being "the more and slower you cover with your XR view, the better the final result will be". I have not seen an actual data or waypoint limitation yet, but rest assured - the more you lean towards following the above tip, the longer you'll wait for the virtual result. I mean, a SIMPLE fast scan - a "test flight" of my place initially, took around FOUR HOURS to complete its render. Whatever X/VR format this chooses to save the render to, it loads into your headset *very quickly (*but I have the ASUS BE98 Pro Flagship quad-band wifi7 router powering my meta streams, so ...)

Speaking of file formats, imagine how cool it would be to be able to save compiled renders in a SPECIFIC format - something you can import in Blender or other 3D level/environment creator! Maybe that could be seen as a potential feature add for a future upgrade ... and maybe (noob side is gonna show now) there's already VR room scanners, that can do just that?!

But hey, I don't mean to steer you away from something that I think is quite a lot of fun. Loving it so far!! I'm curious, what if, I scanned INSIDE my house, and then ... scanned the outside? Only one way to find out ....

🥽🥽🥽🥽 out of 🥽🥽🥽🥽🥽.

It worked fantastic one time. And one time only. I tried to scan another room, but there was no option to scan another room. I went online and there was no information so apparently you can only scan one room and no more. And there’s no support for hyper scape.
I was going to make a before and after scan of a room, but you can't pay to create another one, now all I have is a scan of a messy room.

reviews.review_description: Can someone please help me? I have some insanely detailed scans I made on the preview app and what I believe could be either the forced navigator UI or a server issue, when I start the Preview app the UI and any loaded scans flicker and lag like mad making it unusable. Save my scans please 🙏

reviews.review_title: Could you add hand tracking please
reviews.review_description: Would love to try this unfortunately don't have controllers. Could you add hand tracking to the app. Thanks
Love this app. It’s really great. I would love the ability to export the scans though to software like Blender or Unity.

On my Quest 3, I can scan, upload the data, and calculate the results, but unfortunately, I can't retrieve them. The examples and the simple demo app don't work either. The app starts and the selection appears, but the result is incomplete and displayed incorrectly. The controller doesn't work. The graphics appear corrupted, and the app crashes and returns to the selection window.

Latest Meta OS 81 (German)

Great scan of my living room, practically photo realistic. I can even closely view my knicknacks on my selves. However I am the only person in the world that can view this! When may I set this scan as my home in Worlds or even just share it with a friend????

This give value back into Quest. I must say as a hardcore VR nerd, I am very impressed. This is the future.
I would like to share my captures. 

Suggestion: Meta staff should clean up the older version of apps. For example , It's hard to know, which version is newer. Hyperscape Beta or Preview. There are many discontinued apps, that actually say discontinued. Clean it up..

reviews.review_title: Works in Brazil-but only in some cities
reviews.review_description:
I tried running the Hyperscape demo in several places in Brazil, and even in many cities the SP state it would not work (on previous versions, it would show issues with latency, on current versions, it says there is no capacity available). In the ES state I managed to get it working, and it worked very well most of the time.

The experience is very similar to other Gaussian Splatting softwares running on PCs (which makes sense, since the rendering happens remotely and the result is streamed back to the headset). Both the Gaussian Splatting and the streaming are actually impressive when you think about all that is required to make it work so smoothly.

This could save VR and be 'the' killer app if they find out how to give it a practical purpose, like make it where you can be together with your friend in VR in thier own living room, or be able to play games with someone together in thier own home office

reviews.review_title: Got it running and it's incredible
reviews.review_description: I spent 10 minutes carefully scanning my kitchen and was blown away with the result. It legitimately tricked me into thinking I was walking around in my kitchen, until I ran into my recliner in the front room. Awesome tech, and I'm excited to see where this goes from here.

It seems only a year ago that I was going gaga over making 3D scans with my phone. So impressed that I discussed a vision of the upcoming multi-player (or multi-visitor 😁) update with ChatGPT back then. And here it (nearly)is! The idea of being able to have several friends from around the world sit in my den and visit is just mind blowing! I hope someone is working on realistic avatars using face scans this same way. I’m really looking forward to future updates. Well done Meta. 👍🏻

Can’t wait to use it when I can invite friends to my room etc but I really like it. I’m a little concerned about how Meta stores the data etc and how they use it but the app itself is amazing, honestly.

Ive wanted this technology ever since I first saw matterport.

The idea of 3d scanning a location and time and being able to visit it when ever I want is magic.

The 3 step process is very simple.

I scanned my daughters bedroom because im half way through a DIY project and my back garden.

It took me about 10/15 minute a scan and then  it took maybe 3 hours to process on metas servers.

To say im impressed with the results from my first attempt is an understatement, its incredible. 

I plan on doing scans of all seasons in the garden and all the holidays like Christmas and Halloween in our decorated living space. I also plan on taking the quest on holiday to scan some select locations like balconies or queit coves.

Im hoping meta eventually enable the ability to change lighting  and it would be great if you could upload a looping audio clip to add to the immersion. 

I honestly think this app will sell headsets for this alone. 

Thank you Meta.

reviews.review_title: No ! I cannot run the latest version
reviews.review_description:
I've been using this app regularly since last year, and it's great...
...but the latest version has removed the option to use a "poor" network connection (whatever that is).
To the dev team: PLEASE put that back !
Also, please document the minumum network connection requirements.
I'd be happy to improve my network connection...but I need guidance on what to aim for !

Conflicting information regarding which Platforms can be used in the 'Description' and 'More Information'.
It says that it's available for Meta Quest 2 but it doesn't open at all.
Update: After installing the latest update it opens fine but I keep getting messages that my network connection is unstable and the images are very blurry. This isn't a problem with any of my other apps or games. I'm hoping this will be improved very soon as well as having the ability to scan and capture my own images.

developer_response.body: Thanks for bringing this to our attention DarleenGRS! Hyperscape Preview is available Quest 2, Quest Pro, Quest 3 and Quest 3S. Enjoy checking out the featured Hyperscape worlds!

reviews.review_description: Very choppy it was telling my connection was unstable. My wifi is the latest and greatest works fine on all my devices.  However can't wait till the bugs get worked out. Also be cool to explore more areas of the scenes but that might be asking to much. Lol.. let us know when it's fixed

I'm on latest PTC v83

When it's working normally it's amazing.
The concept of it is great idea, however the final result is not so good as the demo ones in the app, but it is pretty good what detail is picks up and the exact scale is real good.
I downloaded it on quest 2 when I opened it ITS KEEPS LOADING THEN IT BRINGS ME BACK TO LIBARY

While it's not a bad simplification of the scan-to-splat pipeline, there's not enough control or functionality for it to be much more than a fun tech demo. The scanning process is long if you want decent results - scanning a whole building using this technique would take hours if not days, so not really practical for any commercial applications. One can only hope the ability to share spaces arrives by release time. My main frustration with the current version is that all the scans I've personally made are returned for viewing at around 85% real world scale, which makes one feel like a giant the whole time. That said, the lighting and colors are pretty accurate. Great to see the depth camera doing something useful.

reviews.review_title: Itd be nice... If it didnt stream...
reviews.review_description: Seriously, download this content. Run locally. Not every last program has to depend on your metaverse cloud data collectiom while my janky home wifi struggles to play videos even outside vr. The quest 3 has a half a terabyte of storage and theres not enough good VR games on it to even get to 100 gb, so please, use that storage to download large files to be played locally on the quest. Oh and unless you (Meta) have added local downloads as a feature in an update, dont reply to this review.

Go to your meta quest app open your device go to settings, advanced settings, turn on public test channel, go to settings in your meta quest, update, restart (may need to restart twice). You now have the new quest ui and can download this app. Hope this helps
Love the app it works great!
A beautiful, easy to use app. Meta please keep this going, it's incredible

reviews.review_title: Finally looks as good as Reality Viewer
reviews.review_description:
I tried Hyperscapes about a year ago and it was rubbish compared to Reality Viewer, but tried it again recently and it has vastly improved. It is now as good as Reality Viewer except for one thing. I am getting motion sickness with Hyperscapes, but I'm not getting that problem with Reality Viewer. I think it's because Hyperscapes has a lower frame rate which I am sensitive to in VR. If they improved the frame rate then i don't think i would get motion sickness. 

I also noticed that Reality Viewer is no longer available on the Meta store. I am wondering if this is deliberate by Meta because it was showing them up. But I notice it's still available on sidequest. I would totally recommend Reality Viewer as well if this type of thing interests you.
Great for what it is! need the ability to create our own. Cool demo. PS Meta please release a high res headset to compete with Apple. Enough with the demos.

Overall image I got after creating world is not as nice as the sample ones. Perhaps it’s my technique. I made one of my enclosed patio, where I love to hang out, except for cold wet or snowy days, but now I can place myself in my comfy patio year round.  I see a lot of potential for this feature.
Is close, just have to be patient reliable and let us share and export. And upload reliably.
It is the best

I think my room was kind of dark, and I moved too fast. I will try this again with better lighting, and move slower. Two stars because of me. Please add the option to delete our creations. If there is one it didn’t show up on mine.
Cantstart
It's impressive

100% ￼ fun bro 
￼
Just wish the waiting times were shorter. Surely meta has enough processing power to make this faster?

I Like it
Incredible results. Easy to use. Create photo realistic scenes to revisit at any time.
So laggy that i had trouble getting out and started getting a headache

I came back on my quest after a year of waiting for hyperscape just to find out after i downloaded the capture feature it still doesn’t open waste of time maybe in 2028 they will fix it came back after a year to find they took away home environments waste time crapp waited two years just to anchor my display going backwards meta are

Let’s be patient for the new update so we can get the beta
It is not the last edition, but it is wonderful, and the future of saving memories ,but it needs time to become perfect and smooth

Happy for the direction vr/xr is headed. This app being able to capture your own real environments and upload them for later viewing is a brilliant idea. The existing environments felt like I was actually there. Incredible! Try it out and be grateful for what it is.

A big fat WOW.  How does it work? Its incredible. I'm totally blown away great job excellent work.
5 star easy ✨️ 👌

Personally I have a use for this and I'm very grateful for the teck.

Or hard to reach locations for others to experience. Or people in hospital and care homes that are home sick. The list goes on. I'm very excited to were this app go's

reviews.review_title: Nice idea. Hopefully they will improve.
reviews.review_description:
Nice concept. I imagine they will improve photo realism in the future. Actually it is good quality but not photo realistic.
I had very high expectations for this app and it didn’t live up to them. I can assure that I played games (like half life alyx) that have a better image quality. I think it will be incredible when the image quality truly achieves photorealism. However I have to say this is still a demo and I am getting a warning about my connection being poor because the round trip time is 27 ms instead of the recommended  25 ms. I don’t know if this makes any difference in the texture quality, and I have a connection that is not superfast. Only 120 Mbit in download.
EDIT: FYI I was able to solve the issue of the round trip time by directly connecting to the main router of my home network. Before I was using the extender. Anyway nothing is changed in terms of texture quality. I have to add I am running the app on Meta Quest 2. Maybe on Quest 3 it looks better.

I after the recent "Upgrade" i could not find a way to escape the pink purple vomit that is horizon worlds. I loaded this, hit the meta button to crash the app, and then everything i didn't want went black.
Would be nice to have it and would give me a rough idea on how long i have to wait

Or must I cloud render and stream it? And how do I do that?? I'm a 3D artist with some great .ply's built, but I'm struggling to get them working on my quest 3. Thanks for your help!

In fact the app exposes the weakness of the Quest 3.  In this kind of environment, just like VR YouTube videos, the resolution is poor and breaks the immersion.

So hopefully this is just a bug and will be fix soon but as of now it does not work for many people

reviews.review_title: Not realistic like the preview video.
reviews.review_description: I have a multigig fiber connection and that passed with no problem. But on the Quest 3 these scenes look no better than the typical rendered environments. Blurry and vague. And the AI causes the detail to constantly shift. It does not look anything like the bullshot preview video.
It’s says Error now and what’s taking so long to process it and it’s not working on my Quest 2
Passes the bandwidth check (500Mbps up/down) but stays on a black screen playing music. Never loads. Seems to be a common issue.

developer_response.body: Great news - the black screen issue some users were experiencing has now been resolved. If you still see a black screen or experience any other issues, press the Meta button on your right Touch controller to pull up your universal menu and select "Report problem" from the Quick Settings panel.
